summary: Iteration 85 - Smart-Sync Refinement Testing. Verified Photo Tools drawer features including On-Demand toggle redirect, geographic range badges, and menu items. Found hierarchy order issue: Go On-Demand toggle section renders BEFORE Start a Live Session instead of AFTER as per Final Hierarchy requirement.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - Failed to fetch stats
minor.status: NOTED - Non-blocking for current test scope
NOTED - Non-blocking for current test scope

ui_bugs.issue: Menu hierarchy order incorrect: Go On-Demand toggle section renders BEFORE 'Start a Live Session' and 'Other Shooters Nearby'. Per Final Hierarchy requirement, order should be: 1. Start a Live Session, 2. Other Shooters Nearby, 3. Go On-Demand toggle, 4. My Gallery, 5. Bookings Manager, 6. Earnings Dashboard
ui_bugs.location: Lines 333-408 render before menuItems at line 458

on_demand_toggle_redirect.details: Go On-Demand toggle correctly redirects to /photographer/on-demand-settings?init=true when turning ON

on_demand_settings_init_banner.details: On-Demand Settings page shows 'Go On-Demand' init flow banner with geographic range badge (30-50 mi for Pro)

geographic_range_pro.details: Pro/Approved Pro users see 30-50 mile range. Coverage Range section shows 'Verified Pro' badge

other_shooters_nearby_navigation.details: Other Shooters Nearby menu item correctly navigates to /map?filter=photographers

start_live_session_styling.details: Start a Live Session has isPrimary styling with red color (text-red-400) and red background (bg-red-500/10)

bookings_manager_badge.details: Bookings Manager shows NEW badge and 'Tiered pricing • Unlimited media packages' description

header_lockdown.details: Header remains stationary during drawer scroll (position unchanged: top=185.6px before and after scroll)

menu_hierarchy_order.details: Go On-Demand toggle section renders BEFORE Start a Live Session. Should be: 1. Start a Live Session, 2. Other Shooters Nearby, 3. Go On-Demand, 4. My Gallery, 5. Bookings Manager, 6. Earnings Dashboard

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix PhotoToolsDrawer.js menu hierarchy order - Move Go On-Demand toggle section (lines 333-408) to render AFTER 'Start a Live Session' and 'Other Shooters Nearby' menu items, but BEFORE 'My Gallery'
critical_code_review_comments: PhotoToolsDrawer.js line 333-408: Go On-Demand toggle section renders before menuItems. Per Final Hierarchy (lines 170-177 comments), it should be position 3, after Start a Live Session (1) and Other Shooters Nearby (2)
The menuItems array correctly defines the order (lines 179-250), but the JSX render order places the toggle section before the menu items loop
Geographic range logic correctly implemented: getGeographicRadius() returns {min:30, max:50} for Pro/Approved Pro, {min:10, max:20} for standard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo Tools drawer hierarchy order needs fix. Go On-Demand toggle section should render AFTER Start a Live Session and Other Shooters Nearby, not before. All other features (toggle redirect, geographic range, navigation, styling) working correctly.
